import collections

def ford_fulkerson(graph, source, sink):
    n = len(graph)
    residual_graph = [row[:] for row in graph]
    max_flow = 0

    parent = [-1] * n

    while True:
        visited_nodes = [False] * n
        path_flow_for_node = [0] * n

        queue = collections.deque()
        queue.append(source)
        visited_nodes[source] = True
        path_flow_for_node[source] = float('inf')

        path_found = False
        while queue:
            u = queue.popleft()

            for v in range(n):
                if not visited_nodes[v] and residual_graph[u][v] > 0:
                    queue.append(v)
                    visited_nodes[v] = True
                    parent[v] = u
                    path_flow_for_node[v] = min(path_flow_for_node[u], residual_graph[u][v])

                    if v == sink:
                        path_found = True
                        break
            if path_found:
                break

        if not path_found:
            break

        current_path_flow = path_flow_for_node[sink]
        max_flow += current_path_flow

        s = sink
        while s != source:
            p = parent[s]
            residual_graph[p][s] -= current_path_flow
            residual_graph[s][p] += current_path_flow
            s = p

    return max_flow
